item.description:
# Clip 1.1.0
Clip 1.1.0 adds optional native click highlights for clearer demonstrations.
## Click Highlights
- Enable **Click Highlights** directly from the menu-bar quick controls or in **Settings → Recording**. - Clip remembers the choice and restores it when retaking a recording. - Highlights are rendered natively into the captured video by ScreenCaptureKit. - Cursor visibility and click highlights remain independent, and the feature does not require Accessibility permission.
Click Highlights are Off by default.
## Requirements and first launch
Clip requires macOS 15 or later on Apple silicon.
This build remains Apple Development signed rather than Developer ID signed and notarized. A direct browser download may therefore require **Open Anyway** in **System Settings → Privacy & Security**.
